title: koeleria pyramidata var. brevifolia
intro: Koeleria pyramidata var. brevifolia, also known as short-leaved June grass, is a perennial grass species native to the mountainous regions of Europe. The plant has been utilized in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it a potential treatment for various health issues such as wounds, fever, and gastrointestinal problems. The health benefits of Koeleria pyramidata var. brevifolia include its ability to stimulate digestion, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and used in teas, infusions, or tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety as a medicinal herb.
